user.title: Configure Codex Usage
user.description: Enter the path to the Codex OAuth auth file on this Home Assistant host. Run `codex login` on the host first if the file does not exist.

error.auth_file_unreadable: Could not read the Codex auth file
error.missing_access_token: The Codex auth file does not contain an access token

init.title: Codex Usage Options
init.description: Configure polling interval. Note: the usage API has rate limits, so avoid setting this too low.
